name: soda-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for SODA (ACM-SIAM Symposium on Discrete Algorithms) submissions: venue fit and routing across the theory calendar, HotCRP submission with the no-page-limit full-version norm, lightweight double-blind hygiene, the short rebuttal window, SIAM proceedings camera-ready, ALENEX/SOSA satellite routing, and full-cycle workflow. Grounded in the SODA 2027 SIAM pages and HotCRP site, SIAM epubs proceedings volumes, and dblp, checked on 2026-07-08.
